column2: New Permission for SO Modified Approval
column4: Verify new permission is required to approve SOs in SO Modified status
column6: SO exists in SO Modified status and user has existing approve:so permission
column7:
1. Request SO and modify it to reach SO Modified status
  2. Login as user with only 'approve:so' permission (old permission)
  3. Navigate to SO Modified SO
  4. Verify user cannot approve the SO
  5. Login as user with new permission for SO Modified approval
  6. Navigate to same SO Modified SO
  7. Verify user can see Approve button
  8. Click Approve button
  9. Verify SO status changes to SO Created
  10. Confirm approval is successful
column8: New permission is required and working correctly. Users with only old permission cannot approve SO Modified status. Users with new permission can approve successfully.

column8: SO Modified status SOs are visible in Margin Approval tab with correct status and details

column2: Auto-Approval for Quantity Modification - 105% Threshold
column4: Verify quantity modification up to 105% is auto-approved on first time
column6: SO exists in SO Created status with approved quantity
column7:
1. SO with approved quantity of 100 MT
  2. Login as Sales Associate
  3. Navigate to SO details
  4. Modify quantity to 105 MT (105% of 100 MT)
  5. Submit the modification
  6. Verify SO is auto-approved without requiring VP/Risk approval
  7. Check status changes directly to SO Created
  8. Verify no approval workflow is triggered
  9. Verify modification is logged
  10. Test that this works only for first-time modification
column8:
Quantity modification up to 105% is auto-approved on first time without requiring approval workflow

Note: Quantity modifications initiated by the SA, if done upto 105% or 5 MT (whichever is higher) of the approved SO quantity, can be auto-approved, and should not need any approvals if it happens for the first time

column2: Auto-Approval for Quantity Modification - 5 MT Threshold
column4: Verify quantity modification up to 5 MT is auto-approved on first time
column6: SO exists in SO Created status with approved quantity less than 100 MT
column7:
1. SO with approved quantity of 10 MT
  2. Login as Sales Associate
  3. Navigate to SO details
  4. Modify quantity to 15 MT (5 MT increase)
  5. Submit the modification
  6. Verify SO is auto-approved without requiring VP/Risk approval
  7. Check status changes directly to SO Created
  8. Verify no approval workflow is triggered
  9. Verify modification is logged
  10. Test that 5 MT threshold takes precedence when 105% is less than 5 MT
column8:
Quantity modification up to 5 MT is auto-approved on first time when 5 MT is higher than 105%
Note: Quantity modifications initiated by the SA, if done upto 105% or 5 MT (whichever is higher) of the approved SO quantity, can be auto-approved, and should not need any approvals if it happens for the first time

column2: Auto-Approval Only for First Time Modification
column4: Verify auto-approval works only for first-time quantity modification
column6: SO exists in SO Created status
column7:
1. SO with approved quantity of 100 MT
  2. Login as Sales Associate
  3. Modify quantity to 105 MT (first modification - within threshold)
  4. Verify auto-approval works
  5. Wait for SO to be auto-approved
  6. Modify quantity again to 110 MT (second modification)
  7. Verify second modification requires approval workflow
  8. Check SO moves to SO Modified status requiring approval
  9. Verify VP/Risk approval is needed for second modification
column8: Auto-approval works only for first-time modification. Subsequent modifications require approval workflow

column2: Quantity Modification Exceeding Threshold Requires Approval
column4: Verify quantity modification exceeding 105% or 5 MT requires approval
column6: SO exists in SO Created status
column7:
1. Request SO with approved quantity of 100 MT
  2. Login as Sales Associate
  3. Navigate to SO details
  4. Modify quantity to 110 MT (110% - exceeds 105% threshold)
  5. Submit the modification
  6. Verify SO moves to SO Modified status
  7. Check approval workflow is triggered
  8. Verify VP/Risk approval is required
  9. Verify SO is visible in Margin Approval and Risk Approval tabs
  10. Test approval process works correctly
column8: Quantity modification exceeding 105% or 5 MT threshold requires approval workflow

column2: Expected Margin Calculation with SO Gross Price
column4: Verify expected margin calculation is correct when PO price is from SO Gross Price
column6: SO exists with margin allocation using SO Gross Price option
column7:
1. Request SO with:
  - SO Gross Price: ₹3000/Qtl
  - Bag Deduction: 1% of Gross Price
  - Cash Discount: 1% of Gross Price
  - SO Net Price: ₹2940/Qtl
  2. Login as State Head
  3. Select 'SO Gross Price' option
  4. Add margin allocation with Purchase Price: ₹2970/Qtl
  5. Verify expected margin calculation
  6. Check margin percentage: (3000 - 2970) / 3000 = 1.0%
  7. Verify calculation is displayed correctly
  8. Compare with SO Net Price calculation to verify difference
column8: Expected margin calculation is correct when using SO Gross Price (1.0% instead of -1.02%)

column2: Ideal ROCE Calculation with Payable Days
column4: Verify Ideal ROCE calculation includes Payable Days when provided
column6: SO exists with margin allocation including Payable Days
column7:
1. Request SO with margin allocation
  2. Add Payable Days: 15 days
  3. Add margin allocation details:
  - Total Buyer Payment: ₹100000
  - Total Supplier Payment: ₹95000
  - Repayment Timeline: 30 days
  4. Verify Ideal ROCE calculation uses formula:
  Ideal ROCE = (Total Buyer Payment - Total Supplier Payment) / Total Buyer Payment × (Days of Month / (Repayment Timeline - Payable Days))
  5. Calculate: (100000 - 95000) / 100000 × (30 / (30 - 15))
  6. Verify calculated value matches displayed value
  7. Test with different Payable Days values
  8. Verify calculation updates when Payable Days changes
column8: Ideal ROCE calculation correctly includes Payable Days in the formula

column2: Ideal ROCE Calculation without Payable Days
column4: Verify Ideal ROCE calculation works correctly when Payable Days is not provided
column6: SO exists with margin allocation without Payable Days
column7:
1. Request SO with margin allocation
2. Leave Payable Days empty (optional)
3. Add margin allocation details:
- Total Buyer Payment: ₹100000
- Total Supplier Payment: ₹95000
- Repayment Timeline: 30 days
4. Verify Ideal ROCE calculation uses original formula (without Payable Days):
Ideal ROCE = (Total Buyer Payment - Total Supplier Payment) / ((Payment Terms of Buyer / Days of Month) × Total Buyer Payment)
5. Verify calculation works correctly
6. Compare with Payable Days calculation to verify difference
column8: Ideal ROCE calculation works correctly when Payable Days is not provided using original formula
column9: Buyer Payment: ₹100000, Supplier Payment: ₹95000, Repayment Timeline: 30 days, Payable Days: Not provided, Ideal ROCE: Uses original formula
